productDisplayName: Status Quo Men's London Icon Navy T-shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with dual toned print on the chest, grey piping at sleeve ends and shirt seam, coupled with stylish stitch detailing at the back and on shoulder flapsWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking5. Remove promptly6. Line dry inside-out in shade7. Warm iron only8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFittingRegularGet the iconic red telephone box near Big Ben out of the streets of London and into your wardrobe with this retro t-shirt from status quo. The brightly shaded graphic print of this iconic telephone box in red with fading grey print renders the tee an energetic look, while the stitch detailing in red and white in the form of a "T" and grey piping along the sleeves and seam gives it a completely urban look. Pair this with denims or casual bottoms and stylish shoes from the international range now available at myntra to complete that style mantra.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
